name: Table
import: import { Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell } from '@/components/ui/table'
description: M3 data table. Header uses label-small (12px/500) with on-surface-variant color. Rows separated by outline-variant dividers. Wrap in rounded-xl container.
example: Name Status Date Jane Smith Active 2026-02-10
never: Never use raw <table> -- always use Table components
Never hardcode table colors -- use on-surface and on-surface-variant tokens
Never use heavy borders -- M3 tables use subtle outline-variant dividers
